ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the meeting in UTC format */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the meeting in minutes */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the meeting */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the meeting will be conducted */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the meeting */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to join the meeting */,
  "meeting_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the meeting (e.g., webinar, workshop) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who created the meeting */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who last updated the meeting */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the meeting is recurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., attendee, moderator) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the participant */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the participant belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_participants" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's attendance (e.g., confirmed, declined) */,
  "join_time" TEXT /* Time the participant joined the meeting */,
  "leave_time" TEXT /* Time the participant left the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_agendas" (
  "agenda_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the agenda item */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting to which the agenda item belongs */,
  "agenda_item" TEXT /* Description of the agenda item */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration for the agenda item in minutes */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the agenda item (e.g., 1 for high, 5 for low) */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who submitted the agenda item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agenda_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_agendas_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_agendas_submitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting for which feedback was submitted */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1-5) */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions provided by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_feedback_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions granted to this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the schedule */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting that is recurring */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the meeting (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "next_meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the next meeting occurrence */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the recurring meetings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_schedules_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting related to the notification */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., reminder, confirmation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resource */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the resource is associated with */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who uploaded the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_resources_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_recordings" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the recording */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting that was recorded */,
  "recording_link" TEXT /* Link to the recording */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date when the recording was made */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the recording in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_recordings_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the meeting type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the meeting type (e.g., webinar, workshop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meeting type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
